inputs.label: Initial Concentration [A]₀
inputs.businessContext: Starting molar concentration of reactant A in a second-order reaction (rate = k[A]² or k[A][B] with [A]₀ = [B]₀)

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting molar concentration of reactant A in a second-order reaction (rate = k[A]² or k[A][B] with [A]₀ = [B]₀)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci dereceden bir reaksiyonda A reaktanının başlangıç molar derişimi (hız = k[A]² veya k[A][B] ve [A]₀ = [B]₀)

inputs.label: Rate Constant (k)
inputs.businessContext: Second-order rate constant to quantify reaction speed

businessContext_i18n.en: Second-order rate constant to quantify reaction speed
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reaksiyon hızını ölçmek için ikinci derece hız sabiti

inputs.label: Elapsed Time (t)
inputs.businessContext: Time at which to calculate the concentration of A

businessContext_i18n.en: Time at which to calculate the concentration of A

inputs.label: Target Concentration [A]
inputs.businessContext: Desired concentration of A used to calculate the required reaction time

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired concentration of A used to calculate the required reaction time
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerekli reaksiyon süresini hesaplamak için kullanılan istenen A derişimi
